title: The grid container
description: display: grid gives you 2D layout in rows and columns.

questions.prompt: How do you make a container use CSS Grid?
questions.explanation: display: grid turns direct children into grid items.

questions.prompt: Which property defines the column tracks?
questions.explanation: grid-template-columns defines column tracks; grid-template-rows defines rows.

questions.prompt: How many columns does the grid have?
questions.explanation: Three track values → three columns. fr distributes free space.

options: 1 fraction of the leftover free space
questions.explanation: fr = fraction of available free space in the grid container.

questions.prompt: Shortest way to get 4 equal columns?
questions.explanation: repeat(N, size) is shorthand for repeating track patterns.

questions.prompt: gap: 16px on a grid does what?
options: Adds space between rows AND columns
questions.explanation: gap shorthand sets row-gap and column-gap.
